pi_items.source: 3D Slicer Sample Data (MRHead.nrrd) and Slicer ACPCLine module documentation/source code.
3D Slicer Sample Data (MRHead.nrrd) and Slicer ACPCLine module documentation/source code.
Euclidean distance calculation between verified AC and PC coordinates for MRHead.nrrd.

privileged_info_summary: The MRHead.nrrd dataset is a real MRI scan used in 3D Slicer. The ground truth RAS coordinates for the Anterior Commissure (AC) are [-0.5, 2.0, -4.0] and for the Posterior Commissure (PC) are [-0.5, -23.0, -2.0]. The Euclidean distance between these specific points is approximately 25.08 mm. The standard anatomical range for AC-PC distance in adult human brains is typically between 20.0 mm and 32.0 mm.
